title: Fermented Norwegian Applesauce Stew
description: A vibrant, juicy vegetarian stew made with fermented applesauce, poached in a light broth for a unique Nordic twist. Perfect for meal prep and quick weeknight meals.

ingredients.name: fermented apple sauce
ingredients.notes: Pre-fermented store-bought or homemade (e.g., 10-14 days aged)

instructions: In a medium pot, combine fermented apple sauce, diced potato, leek, carrot, and bay leaf.
Add 1 cup water and bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Stir in 1 teaspoon of apple cider vinegar to brighten the flavors, then remove from heat.
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
